title: Infosys Foundation commits over INR 48 crore for maternal and child healthcare in rural Karnataka
detailed_summary: Infosys Foundation announced a CSR collaboration with Prashanthi Balamandira Trust to support Sri Sathya Sai Sarla Memorial Hospital in rural Karnataka. The Foundation pledged over INR 48 crore to augment maternal and child healthcare infrastructure, facilities, and some operational costs. The initiative is expected to benefit over 8,000 deserving individuals annually with free medical care.

key_facts.fact: Infosys Foundation announced its collaboration with Prashanthi Balamandira Trust to support Sri Sathya Sai Sarla Memorial Hospital in providing free medical care to underprivileged women, infants, and children in rural Karnataka.
key_facts.section_heading: Infosys Foundation Commits over INR 48 Crore to Boost Maternal and Child Healthcare in Rural Karnataka

key_facts.fact: Infosys Foundation pledged a grant of over INR 48 crore to augment healthcare infrastructure and facilities in maternal and childcare services, with a portion covering operational costs.
key_facts.section_heading: Infosys Foundation Commits over INR 48 Crore to Boost Maternal and Child Healthcare in Rural Karnataka

key_facts.fact: The initiative is expected to benefit over 8,000 deserving individuals annually by ensuring timely medical interventions and specialized care free of charge.
key_facts.section_heading: Infosys Foundation Commits over INR 48 Crore to Boost Maternal and Child Healthcare in Rural Karnataka

esg_or_csr_items.item: Infosys Foundation committed funding to support free and accessible maternal and child healthcare through Sri Sathya Sai Sarla Memorial Hospital in rural Karnataka.
